LanguageData.FCP_Ability_PRC_Stealth_Field.descriptio: Activate the Chinese stealth suit's advanced cloaking technology to become nearly invisible. The light-bending field distorts the wearer's outline, making them extremely difficult to detect. Lasts for a short duration before requiring a recharge.
LanguageData.FCP_Ability_PRC_Stealth_Field.label: stealth field
